steps.title: Identify the decisive clue
steps.content: The second sentence states the sloth's disappearance “likely affected several other species.” The word “affected” reveals the passage is discussing the impact or effects of the extinction.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Consequences for” means effects or outcomes—exactly what the context requires. The others introduce different concepts that don't fit the meaning of impact. That matches choice B — B is correct.
